subcodes.first_line: O true friends! The chalice of the Covenant brimmeth with the wine of the Testament, and the dawn of bounty hath risen from the horizon of all existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان راستان جام عهد بباده میثاق طافح است و صبح عنایت از افق امکان طالع و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @unity in diversity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power of prayer
